scripts.render:hero: remotion render Hero-9x16 out/hero-9x16.mp4 && remotion render Hero-1x1 out/hero-1x1.mp4 && remotion render Hero-16x9 out/hero-16x9.mp4
scripts.render:features: remotion render Composer-9x16 out/composer-9x16.mp4 && remotion render Threads-9x16 out/threads-9x16.mp4 && remotion render Search-9x16 out/search-9x16.mp4 && remotion render Tablet-16x9 out/tablet-16x9.mp4
scripts.render:all: npm run render:hero && npm run render:features
